3284800.name: Clickonomy
3284800.description:
Welcome to Clickonomy — a minimalist and cozy sandbox game where every click matters!

A tiny planet uniquely yours — Shape it at your own pace by clicking, collecting, and watching it slowly come to life. Scan the surface to reveal unknown resources waiting to be discovered and harvest tons of interesting plants, ores and woods.

Transform everything you find — Recycling is a key part of your journey, so transform what you find into useful goods with the help of a dedicated recycler that will overload all your senses.

Dozens of gems to collect — As your efficiency grows, you will reach new heights and uncover rare gems to build your reputation, step by step. These treasures can either be kept in your ever expanding collection or you can put them up to auction and try to get the most money out of them.

Craft your tool — With your customisable tool as a main companion, craft your way through this green odyssey. Each part of your tool will give different bonuses based on its rarity!

But remember to care for your planet — Every action leaves a mark. Nurture it, make it flourish again, and take the time to capture its beauty.

Everything is yours to click!
